name: Deskbot 008
name_jp: ブンボーグ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>０</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>０</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>８</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Deskbot" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.

[ Monster Effect ] 
This card gains 500 ATK for each "Deskbot" card in your Graveyard. Your opponent cannot target face-up "Deskbot" cards with card effects, except this one. This card can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Deskbot" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.
mnst_eff: This card gains 500 ATK for each "Deskbot" card in your Graveyard. Your opponent cannot target face-up "Deskbot" cards with card effects, except this one. This card can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase.
eff: This card gains 500 ATK for each "Deskbot" card in your Graveyard. Your opponent cannot target face-up "Deskbot" cards with card effects, except this one. This card can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
